project_scope: lattice-based anonymous authentication backend; not a general-purpose anonymous credential system
sha256_circuit_checked: v2.2 native-lowering prototype for selected digest relations: v2_refresh_tag and v2_nullifier
not_yet_machine_checked: concrete LaZer gadget mapping for SHA-256 bit/word constraints
splicing native SHA-256 constraints into auth_repair_params.h and proof generation
complete UC theorem with simulator and composition proof
paper_safe_claim: v2.2 adds a compiler prototype that lowers selected SHA-256 fullrelation IR entries into native-style LaZer-friendly constraint plans, preparing the path toward native SHA-256 constraints while keeping the current proof path honest about integration status.
